title: Packs / Xananode Canonical / Assets / Raw / Protocol / Registry / Federation Targets
summary: packs/xananode-canonical/assets/raw/protocol/registry/federation-targets.json is preserved as a raw Core SDK source artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
{
  "$schema": "./federation-targets.schema.json",
  "federation_targets": [
    {
      "id": "xananode.protocol",
      "name": "XanaNode Protocol Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.protocol",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Protocol repository, preserving schemas, registries, specs, governance, raw source files, and protocol-defining documents as first-class XanaNode records.",
      "status": "canonical",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Protocol.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["CC-BY-4.0", "Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
